title: union of arrays
description: Untagged union of homogeneous arrays (string[] | number[] | boolean[] | Date[]). The matched member is chosen by element kind; only the Date[] arm applies a per-element transform (Date↔ISO string), the rest round-trip their elements verbatim. An empty `[]` value satisfies every arm.
notes: Empty array sample matches all four arms structurally — the round-trip stays an empty array regardless of which member resolves.
